title: Robin's Smithery
description: New Tools, Metal Deco, and More! | The Wyrmsteel Mod
body:
Smithery is a mod about decoration with metal blocks (inspired by the copper variants) and turning Minecraft's gear progression line into a progression _tree_, one branch at a time

<details>
<summary>Resources</summary>

- Rubies: A shiny blood red gem found near the top of The Nether with very ornate blocks
- Rose Gold: A mid-game copper-gold alloy that piglins still love just as much.
- Quicksilver: A sludgy silver material found in pockets around The End (main ingredient in Wyrmsteel)
- Wyrmsteel: A late game material forged from the mysterious Quicksilver and Copper Ingots
  ![Blocks of Ruby, Wyrmsteel, and Rose Gold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b58bd7b1bc13f1f383c62bb98c7059eeba16453.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Decorative Blocks</summary>

- Grates, Chains, and Bars: Each metal now has more decorative block variants inspired by vanilla copper block variants.
  ![I <3 Deco Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa80f83bf93f1a60e95b8f4f9851f395b6512c08.png)
  (connected chains are part of the [Connectible Chains](https://modrinth.com/mod/connectiblechains) mod)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Equipment</summary>

- Wyrmsteel Gear: A late game set of tools prioritizing speed over durability, capable of instamining deepslate with haste 2 and effeciency 5! Wyrmsteel Upgrades can be found in End Cities.
- Rose Gold Gear: A golden armor / toolset reinforced with copper to provide durability similar to stone and about as much protection as chainmail. And Piglins love it!
- Ruby Gear: Like diamonds, but red! Yes, it's pretty much just recolored diamonds (for now).
  ![Ruby, Wyrmsteel, and Rose Gold Sets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc5a8f15332fffe954d177c30aee83f150507b9c.png)

</details>

If you'd like to play on Neoforge, don't worry! It works with [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)!
